name: Colorado Senate Alert
subject: Republicans are panicking about the Senate race in Colorado
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Everything Will Be Okay
body:
Everything Will Be Okay No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jhhyvjk-kujkulhluu-v/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhyvjk-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhyvjk-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Everything Will Be Okay](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhyvjk-kujkulhluu-j/)
In this week's blog post, I discuss an encouraging initiative in a Georgia community to help local artists and lift everyone's spirits during these trying times. I also discuss recent legislation to alleviate the coronavirus crisis including the Senate's multitrillion-dollar coronavirus response package agreed upon late last night. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhyvjk-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhyvjk-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Coronavirus](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhyvjk-kujkulhluu-d/)
Coronavirus (COVID-19) is on everyone's mind. In fact, the first three cases of Coronavirus have been confirmed in Ohio. In this week's blog I discuss this ongoing challenge, what steps have been taken from the executive and legislative level, and finally offer some words of hope and encouragement. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhyvjk-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhyvjk-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [My Take on Super Tuesday](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhyvjk-kujkulhluu-u/)
Yesterday was Super Tuesday. 14 states across the country held their primaries, and one territory, American Samoa. The results were pretty interesting. Joe Biden, who looked like his campaign was on life-support, won BIG. And the press dutifully changed their tone. Joe is now the comeback kid! [Read more >](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhyvjk-kujkulhluu-o/) [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhyvjk-kujkulhluu-b/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhyvjk-kujkulhluu-n/)
### [Bernie and Fidel](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhyvjk-kujkulhluu-p/)
In the course of his political career, the presumptive Democratic nominee for the presidency, Bernie Sanders has had many wacky points of view. In this week's blog, I'll focus on one - Bernie's admiration of the communist dictator, Fidel Castro. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhyvjk-kujkulhluu-x/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhyvjk-kujkulhluu-m/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhyvjk-kujkulhluu-c/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhyvjk-kujkulhluu-q/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhyvjk-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhyvjk-kujkulhluu-f/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhhyvjk-kujkulhluu-z/)
---|---|---
Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16523643/175639160/-940294256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGE3ZjdlNy02NTZmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pBpxH2ZAWc4kRwykG-P7PMO6fV0ZFZ09KldSrxAIx-I=&emci=768aaa29-416d-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=c0a7f7e7-656f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=9814644) Hi team, Kirsten here! If you don’t know me, I’m a mom, one of New York’s senators, and the founder of Off the Sidelines, a group that encourages women and girls across the country to find their voice, get off the sidelines, and make a difference in their communities. Margaret Good encapsulates all of these values—**which is why I’m so excited to endorse her and get involved in her race today.** Off the Sidelines is about women standing up for our values, and making a difference in our communities—something Margaret has done in the Florida State House, and something I know she’ll do once she gets to Congress, too. But if she wants to get there, she needs to beat her entrenched opponent—a feat that won’t be easy since he’s been in office for thirteen years. The way to do it is with grassroots momentum and people power. [**Will you stand with me and support Margaret Good and her campaign for Congress? It’s going to take all of us to get her there.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16523644/175639161/-837406767?recurring=auto&refcode=E1871-20200324-OTSEndorsement-SL&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGE3ZjdlNy02NTZmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pBpxH2ZAWc4kRwykG-P7PMO6fV0ZFZ09KldSrxAIx-I=) | [CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16523645/175639162/-837406767?recurring=auto&refcode=E1871-20200324-OTSEndorsement-SB&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGE3ZjdlNy02NTZmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pBpxH2ZAWc4kRwykG-P7PMO6fV0ZFZ09KldSrxAIx-I=)

For too long, Southwest Florida has been represented by an out-of-touch leader who doesn't have their priorities at heart. Margaret will change that. She’s a fierce advocate for environmental protection, reproductive rights and freedoms, and getting money out of politics—values we need more of in Congress.
[**So, join me right now in supporting Margaret in her campaign to get off the sidelines and oust a thirteen-year incumbent →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16523646/175639163/-837406767?recurring=auto&refcode=E1871-20200324-OTSEndorsement-SL&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGE3ZjdlNy02NTZmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pBpxH2ZAWc4kRwykG-P7PMO6fV0ZFZ09KldSrxAIx-I=)
Thanks,
Kirsten Gillibrand
US Senator, New York

Peter, This has been a long week on non-stop news and it’s been hard to follow everything. [**I wanted to share what’s going on with our campaign. Today at 12:30 CT, I will be going live to give an update on our campaign — where we are, what we are doing, and how you can help. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16525283/175651227/470538770?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDE3YTBkNi02YTZmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D1OjaNnYINm-ReloSvFTqNtHVrExXn6HQKNxzDs4Z8s=&emci=5a17a0d6-6a6f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=5d17a0d6-6a6f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6233172) Our campaign will be focusing on working with the great organizations of our district to get people the resources they need. We are working with folks who are devising plans to take care of the elders in each neighborhood, arranging to pick up groceries for immunocompromised people, boosting food banks and other essential community resources.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16525284/175651228/470538770?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDE3YTBkNi02YTZmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D1OjaNnYINm-ReloSvFTqNtHVrExXn6HQKNxzDs4Z8s=&emci=5a17a0d6-6a6f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=5d17a0d6-6a6f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6233172)
Our first little effort was over the weekend, in Brenham. We were able to raise some funds to boost their efforts — and thanks to over 20 donors, today we have a check for $1105, for the Bread Pantry of Washington County. Thanks to everyone who boosted that effort. We’ve also been working on expanding access to vote by mail and other projects to protect our democracy. We’ll be discussing all this and any questions you have. Make sure to join me this afternoon. Fighting for you,
Mike Siegel

clean_body: Peter, This has been a long week on non-stop news and it’s been hard to follow everything. Our campaign will be focusing on working with the great organizations of our district to get people the resources they need. We are working with folks who are devising plans to take care of the elders in each neighborhood, arranging to pick up groceries for immunocompromised people, boosting food banks and other essential community resources. Our first little effort was over the weekend, in Brenham. We were able to raise some funds to boost their efforts — and thanks to over 20 donors, today we have a check for $1105, for the Bread Pantry of Washington County. Thanks to everyone who boosted that effort. We’ve also been working on expanding access to vote by mail and other projects to protect our democracy. We’ll be discussing all this and any questions you have. Make sure to join me this afternoon. Fighting for you, Mike Siegel ** = PO Box 2409 Austin, TX 78701

name: Jason Yates
subject: What comes after COVID-19?
body:
Peter,
While Americans are trying to adjust to a new reality as a result of COVID-19, Congress settled into a vicious bi-partisan tug-of-war that is out of place in a time when we need to be working together. But this should not be a surprise to anyone.
The complexities of delivering just a semblance of relief to families, businesses and individuals proved to be a more challenging task than anyone anticipated. If we are, as the President suggested, in a time of war, why can’t our elected officials act swiftly _in our best interest_ —rather than persistently pursuing their party’s agenda?
They had ONE JOB to do and yet they used the opportunity to force in billions of wasteful spending – all while many Americans are forced to find ways to best steward their own finances in this time of economic uncertainty.
These are OUR representatives. We elected them. And if we aren’t satisfied with the job they are doing on our behalf during this unprecedented crisis, it’s time to take notes and get ready for what I believe will be the biggest referendum on government in a generation.
In 222 days from today, you’ll have the opportunity to leverage your faith and convictions to send a clear and compelling message to Washington: Your elected officials work for YOU—not the other way around.
That’s why staying plugged into My Faith Votes matters now more than ever.
* The Intersect delivers weekly insights to your inbox to help you make sense of current events and news.
* The devotionals and prayer guides help you in your commitment to pray for our current leaders—and the ones who will take their place soon enough.
* OurChurchVotes.org rallies churches to educate Christians about a Biblical worldview on all parts of life—especially public and civic policies.
* Our Christian college campaign is equipping America’s youngest group of Christian voters to discern biblical truth and vote accordingly.

While we continue in our commitment to empower you with these resources, we also don’t want to lose sight of the REALLY BIG THING coming after COVID-19 - the November elections.
Even now, in the midst of all that is going on in our nation, we need your help as we continue (from our home offices!) to prepare and execute our plan in - what is now - the most important election of our lifetime.
We are behind in this month’s giving and yet, the opportunity to influence the November elections has never been greater.
We are counting on your support.
You can help keep My Faith Votes on the frontlines of engaging, equipping, and mobilizing Christians to take a stand for their faith and the soul of this country.
[Will you prayerfully consider making a $5, $10, or $20 donation](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200326apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200326apl01nd&n=1)?
What happens next in America will be up to us. The leaders we elect will determine if faith, family, and freedom stay at the heart of America as we know it.
Stand with us during this critical time in our country’s history to ensure our values have a voice come November.
[](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200326apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200326apl01nd&n=2)
**United. We Stand.**
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200326apl01nd&n=3)
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200326apl01nd&n=4).

body:
Did you see Maya’s email from earlier this week? We are incredibly excited to have her join the team as our new Digital Organizing Director to help us transition our campaign to organize effectively while maintaining a safe social distance. | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/EAE/ni0YAA/t.30e/wyU2929lTGe1rpH46x4ZoQ/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKCY8vu9-2B-2B5WCCgKJwkKAtVigNui8YknqwpncOO2bGSXcTBUEKBWLqf1mNAMEQ1mXdxkVvnwjy8YWb2slkuO1mJSkl-2BajsQEAyTnDHJoeg-2FRYqGbAE0gS0Pwoq2Cqczfhmlq7Lqh2-2BbtsKYUIX5YyBCmd97PaDztJwkoEcf2CvUI4iaRBN7Eu7nu6RZu3Dn-2FCgYGoJCB-2BNxPnESygFXGO6h7cl9PRJylHkouwfLc0uB7CXvdF8RWzMmRFL4ABrnTlU-3D/m4LL) Friend, **** **** **** Did you see Maya’s email from earlier this week? We are incredibly excited to have her join the team as our new Digital Organizing Director to help us transition our campaign to organize effectively while maintaining a safe social distance. It’s only been a few days and she’s already organized phone banks, built a program to help assist our most vulnerable community members in this crisis, and planned an online town hall meeting.
This is the type of energy, creativity, and experience we need on our team to win in June. But she’s just one person, and in order to execute the digital organizing strategy we want, we need to bring on two more staff members to help her out. **_[Can you make a donation today so we can hire more digital organizers and grow our team?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/EAE/ni0YAA/t.30e/wyU2929lTGe1rpH46x4ZoQ/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKCY8vu9-2B-2B5WCCgKJwkKAtVigNui8YknqwpncOO2bGSXQs7McV6BLdVOkG5EL-2FdjIxZpms0WHwO66gybeN7O8tAM8-2F7zyjPiz2YblZWikPLyMzjTbMtVGyTQenNKYPuDJakimyxAwtsMyTim6WZJTtazbxJVyAw-2BueV7vgbrywjXmSptVucsv-2FIjpaJTD-2BV8VvrWu2Rd8Ao57ykH4P85EfSk5-2FLsCzLGrjSGNR-2FCZuQs-2FsK4WaKGnv61Uxc4ZIIFZE-3D/AMsn)_** **_[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/EAE/ni0YAA/t.30e/wyU2929lTGe1rpH46x4ZoQ/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKCY8vu9-2B-2B5WCCgKJwkKAtVigNui8YknqwpncOO2bGSXXIeWvJ3NWJVRp2x9eJlRM3Ow04xG8A73Ru3PEwiCylwJu9RddHKjy0-2FrW5rE8BQT2zW-2FOZTvfGl96OhRjIbGAt1poDLcscQmCeeyWOBCIxLkOWI7QX7PO4AgDhnrMb4JvGHr5skQeo-2ByqshW5MB3KQ932V6g9BdqyYhTL6EmkK8nuQMYEqYcRbskGx-2BmVoluqsIoVnUeRvSj6x66ySt5nI-3D/JuaO)_**
[Help us grow our digital organizing program >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/EAE/ni0YAA/t.30e/wyU2929lTGe1rpH46x4ZoQ/h3/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKCY8vu9-2B-2B5WCCgKJwkKAtVigNui8YknqwpncOO2bGSXd-2BN97u2Vxs0RTGGbpxyxxFMl9s7awM7I2y5dnV293QKbVFHMlgiX-2FPROecBBLNncHSKtvFVW3hNnjrjfBLAXvUs3mJv2ufy-2BScedWELEV-2B1FcGOiTTZolpUetWJdqCHx9xrByj8jGn8o9PMVgRSR-2BlrOierSVGorij8Sn7VIVDAjiepeTsKXU-2FpUVi0JriRRjP3Cs7LQ7m4CztjbnHwGx8-3D/d0j8)
We can’t do a lot of things we were planning on doing, like knocking on doors and hosting in-person meet and greets. But we’re coming up with new and innovative ways to campaign in this new environment. **_[With your help, we can continue to build the team we need to win in June. Will you chip in today?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/EAE/ni0YAA/t.30e/wyU2929lTGe1rpH46x4ZoQ/h4/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKCY8vu9-2B-2B5WCCgKJwkKAtVigNui8YknqwpncOO2bGSXbWIPoqbiDDsF5kXt3W6AkO1J8gg4rdzl3mv9EYkDHiH4l1rSD1c1brRB40-2FYztSr737njBprK328z-2FJYAzzJdo5FIgWGmoHonOv9W2U1G2eWl3S4tX8shstokThzz94AkfEGeSzSm-2BoDzzEXu-2BSq-2Bz3gj19xWh0gfxPKc6eWK4UjI93-2BVv40PtIpjQNY8Y-2BWM0LoA26d9xPKAE7rxzlOAA-3D/g0oM)_**

name: Nikki Foster
subject: The way forward
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Foster for Ohio
body:
|
---
[ ](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732ce7c/30a4f917/50ba2ac9/28cd1dd7/1233489606/VEsH/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fos_monthly_template?refcode=fos_header_logo&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200326_Forward_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200326_Forward_U2_X1")

| | We're in uncharted territory Folks, we're in uncharted territory. Our election has been postponed, and we're dealing with an unprecedented crisis. Personally, my husband and I are dealing with major uncertainty -- his job as an airline pilot is up in the air, and we have two young children now at home 24/7. **But still, the way out of this is clear: we have to go forward, through the worst of it, together.** Whenever I've felt lost in the last couple days, I've checked my moral compass and known that my path still leads me toward fighting for hard-working families -- harder than ever. **This campaign -- and everything it stands for -- must go on.** And looking ahead, our first big obstacle in this uncharted territory is dead ahead. In less than one week, we face our first End-of-Quarter deadline since our election was postponed. National Republicans will be watching to see if we're still competitive -- or if they can count on Steve Chabot extending his quarter-century career in Congress. clean_body: | "" | | We're in uncharted territory Folks, we're in uncharted territory. Our election has been postponed, and we're dealing with an unprecedented crisis. Personally, my husband and I are dealing with major uncertainty -- his job as an airline pilot is up in the air, and we have two young children now at home 24/7. But still, the way out of this is clear: we have to go forward, through the worst of it, together. Whenever I've felt lost in the last couple days, I've checked my moral compass and known that my path still leads me toward fighting for hard-working families -- harder than ever. This campaign -- and everything it stands for -- must go on. And looking ahead, our first big obstacle in this uncharted territory is dead ahead. In less than one week, we face our first End-of-Quarter deadline since our election was postponed. National Republicans will be watching to see if we're still competitive -- or if they can count on Steve Chabot extending his quarter-century career in Congress. "" | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" This is our chance to replace a Trump loyalist with someone who fights for hard-working families. This is our chance to show the Republican establishment that their time is up. This is our chance to bring our entire country with us on this path forward. "" Nikki | | Nikki Foster is a US Air Force veteran, a working mom, and a Democrat running for Congress in Ohio's 1st congressional district. name: =?utf-8?Q?Nancy=20Mace=20for=20Congress?=
subject: What I learned this week re Corona Virus + Facebook LIVE Tonight 7pm
body:
What I learned this week re Corona Virus - important info - and I will be on Facebook LIVE tonight to answer your questions! | | | [View In Your Browser](https://mailchi.mp/nancymace.org/breaking-a-huge-endorsement-1908341?e=f1831b4ca2) [Forward To A Friend](http://us7.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=e126b0f376&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| | [](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=e0d973b950&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| | Dear Friends,

I'll be honest, it's been a tough week of social distancing. Hats off to our hard-working teachers and our children who are now home schooling champs.

My heart also hurts for those who are now facing unemployment, maybe for the first time in their life. I also feel for the grocery store workers, the drivers making deliveries, physicians and nurses, law enforcement and first responders on the front lines. There is a lot on everyone's plate.

I hope you and your family are doing okay.

I write today to summarize a few things I've learned from experts I spoke with this week on the state of Coronavirus here in the Lowcountry . . . I've talked with everyone from hospital leaders, physicians, nurses, DHEC, SCDEW, law enforcement, business owners, neighbors, you name it: listening to concerns, getting questions answered, helping find solutions. Based on these conversations, there are two things that stick out to me:
---
|
---
| On Tuesday, I interviewed a physician, Dr. Zeigler, Founder of [Heroes Need Masks](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=8f82a0abdb&e=f1831b4ca2), on Facebook LIVE, and answered questions on the immediate needs for medical professionals at this time and where to find resources and testing.

Yesterday, I shared a PSA getting the word out on how the SC Dept. of Employment & Workforce is supporting Lowcountry businesses, businessowners, and those who have fallen victim to an entire economy that has come to a screeching halt. Your unemployment questions answered [here](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=225258b457&e=f1831b4ca2).

I will continue plowing through your questions sent via email, text, Facebook, Twitter and more, to be as responsive as possible in this time of crisis.

Know that I am available 24x7. In fact, I will be back on [**Facebook LIVE tonight at 7pm**](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=24a2fc0b06&e=f1831b4ca2).

I am here to help.

Sincerely,

[](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=4a90966d3a&e=f1831b4ca2)

P.S. Please take a moment to [refer to this page how to keep you and yours safe from the spread of coronavirus HERE](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=4012a3780e&e=f1831b4ca2). Stay safe, sanitize, and social distance. Thank you! I am here to help.
---
|
---
| **COVID-19 Signs and Symptoms**
Fever, cough, chest pain, and shortness of breath.
_Visit_ : [CDC.gov](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=be9aa5cf59&e=f1831b4ca2).

**Telemedicine**
MUSC and Roper Saint Francis offer telemedicine or virtual health screenings for FREE for Corona Virus.
_Visit_ : [MUSC Cares](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=c4dbf51cbc&e=f1831b4ca2) and [RSFH Virtual Health](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=5ad15bf3f5&e=f1831b4ca2)

**South Carolina CoronaVirus Dashboard**
_Visit_ : [scdhec.gov/covid19dash](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=a1776efe36&e=f1831b4ca2)

**Small Business Disaster Relief**
The federal government is offering disaster loans to small businesses.
_Visit_ : [disasterloan.sba.gov/ela](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=213a7b616c&e=f1831b4ca2).

**Filing for Unemployment**
Gov. McMaster has shortened the timeframe for individuals to receive unemployment by one week.
_Visit_ : [SCDEW.gov](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=8917da910a&e=f1831b4ca2).

**Help Our Medical Professionals**
MUSC is accepting donations for Personal Protective Equipment (PPE). To learn what their needs are and how to donate, visit: COVID-19 Donations to MUSC Health.

_General supplies needed:_
N95 masks, surgical masks, protective eyewear, face guards and face shields, hand sanitizer, industrial cleaning wipes, thermometers (all kinds)

_Pharmacy needs:_
Ethanol, Azithromycin, 200-proof USP-grade alcohol, Hydroxychloroquine

_Donations_ may be dropped off at 4295 Arco Ln. in North Charleston, Monday through Friday from 8 a.m. to 5 p.m.

**JOB OPENINGS FOR HEALTHCARE WORKERS**
The South Carolina Medical Association and the South Carolina Hospital Association have joined together to create a database where physicians/licensed personnel can enter their information in order to be hired by S.C. Hospitals who are in need of personnel during the COVID-19 crisis. The database can be found at the following link: [https://scha.org/helpnow](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=280c315f84&e=f1831b4ca2)

---
|
# Helpful Links
---
| [](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=b2d093980b&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
**FACEBOOK LIVE TONIGHT:** I'll host another summary of health issues, small business, unemployment, your questions answered. 7PM at [www.facebook.com/nancyrmace](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=479d76be95&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| [](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=720d08ba36&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
**UNEMPLOYMENT PSA:** I spoke with SC Department of Employment and Workforce getting your unemployment questions answered.
---
| [](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=267a9ed67f&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
**HEROES NEED MASKS DONATION DRIVE:** Local surgeon, Dr. Zeigler, created Heroes Need Masks with his brother to collect donations for our medical workers, nurses, physicians and those on the front lines.
---
| [](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=c5c5e141e5&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
**HOW TO MAKE A MASK:** For those who are most crafty, here is a how-to sew masks for yourself, friends, neighbors, and others who may become ill to help prevent the spread of the virus.
---
| [](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=a129a95155&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
**FLATTENING THE CURVE:** Please watch our PSA on how to flatten the curve.
---
| **[WEBSITE](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=2e8bfda9af&e=f1831b4ca2) | [FACEBOOK](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=e37bfbb334&e=f1831b4ca2) | [TWITTER](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=aba6d695b3&e=f1831b4ca2) | **[**DONATE**](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=3c71c3e888&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
|
---
---
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2020 Nancy Mace, All rights reserved._
You signed up or we've emailed before.

**Our mailing address is:**
Nancy Mace295 Seven Farms DrSuite C - 186Charleston, SC 29492
[Add us to your address book](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/vcard?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=3620791fdc)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/profile?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=3620791fdc&e=f1831b4ca2) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=3620791fdc&e=f1831b4ca2&c=e126b0f376).

[](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=96dd92bccd&e=f1831b4ca2)

http://us7.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id;=e126b0f376&e;=f1831b4ca2
---
| | | | | | [](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=54f92bacd8&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| | [](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=27bf6e26b3&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| | [](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=15f19b3679&e=f1831b4ca2)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Amanda?=
subject: Can you believe this?
body:
Democrats have made it clear that they would rather HURT our Nation than work with Republicans and do what’s right. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/amandamakki/can-you-believe-this?e=bbeef49760)
---
| | | [ ](https://amandamakki.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=532f133099f0522d682bab7e9&id=0d63601bca&e=bbeef49760)
---
| | | Peter,

Just when I thought the Democrats, like Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, and Charlie Crist would put aside their differences for the good of the American People, they proved me wrong yet again. Democrats have made it clear that they would rather HURT our Nation than work with Republicans and do what’s right.

While tens of millions of working families are anxiously waiting on Congress to pass an economic stimulus package that helps American workers, healthcare providers, and small businesses, **the Do-Nothing Democrats would rather further their own corrupt political agenda than do what’s right for the American People.**
---
| [ ](https://amandamakki.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=532f133099f0522d682bab7e9&id=59f9750726&e=bbeef49760)
---
| **Now more than ever, we need to restore Republican control. **That’s why Republican Leaders like Kevin McCarthy, Elise Stefanik, and Steve Scalise have endorsed me so **I can _flip Charlie Crist right out of this seat! _

THIS is just a taste of what Pelosi, Crist and House Democrats tried to put into the COVID-19 economic stimulus bill:**
* Mandated $15 minimum wage
* Funding for sanctuary cities
* Same-day voting
* Automatic voter registration
* USPS debt forgiveness
* Unionization of federal workers
* Newspaper funding
* Mandated corporate carbon offset
* Expanding tax-credits for solar and wind energy

**Enough is enough.** We can’t let them play games with the livelihood of our Nation and its citizens any longer. [Stand with me. While tens of millions of working families are anxiously waiting on Congress to pass an economic stimulus package that helps American workers, healthcare providers, and small businesses, the Do-Nothing Democrats would rather further their own corrupt political agenda than do what’s right for the American People. | | Now more than ever, we need to restore Republican control. subject: BREAKING: Senate passes coronavirus relief bill
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
Late last night the Senate unanimously passed a $2 trillion economic stimulus package in response to the coronavirus pandemic | |
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16535780/175744228/2013293945?refcode=em032620-header&refcode2=76fcf19f-8b6f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmZjZjE5Zi04YjZmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T5Nck4eIuZzTgIZ42XUcFhHwBQSx5xYRdEfOeZU3KtU=) **** | | Friend,

Late last night the Senate unanimously passed a $2 trillion economic stimulus package in response to the coronavirus pandemic – **one that includes $500 billion in corporate bailouts.**

It is not the deal that Democrats wanted, but they did what they could to protect the record 3.3 million people filing for unemployment insurance and millions more with cash payments during this crisis despite having only 47 votes.

As a mayor, public safety director, and head of Homeland Security for Columbus, Georgia for 8 years, I will fight tooth and nail in the Senate to make sure that local communities and healthcare systems have what they need — that’s a promise.

**But I’m counting on your help to do it. Democrats need to flip four seats to take back the Senate majority from Mitch McConnell. Our race in Georgia is one of the top ten most competitive in the country. That’s why it’s so important that I have your support before next week’s FEC deadline.**

**[Pitch in right now to help hit our $25,000 end-of-quarter goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16535784/175744231/2013293945?refcode=em032620-c&refcode2=76fcf19f-8b6f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmZjZjE5Zi04YjZmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T5Nck4eIuZzTgIZ42XUcFhHwBQSx5xYRdEfOeZU3KtU=)** | If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: big announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
I need supporters like YOU to help us get this campaign off the ground.
Friend,
In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make a donation to Reverend Raphael Warnock's campaign for U.S. Senate in Georgia. **But first, let me explain why I am proud to endorse him and why your early support is so critical.**
In 2018, we built a diverse coalition of hardworking folks from all over Georgia, especially Georgians from marginalized communities who felt unseen and unheard. Our fight was rooted in the belief that poverty is immoral, that Georgians deserve access to affordable health care and that the economy ought to work for everyone.
The fact is, people in the White House and the U.S. Senate are failing Georgians of every political party, every race and every region.
The Republican Party's divisive agenda - and systematic voter suppression - goes against everything we stand for as Americans. But here's what gives me hope: All around the country, good people - including many folks who have never been involved with politics before - are stepping up to fight back and defend American values. We have the grassroots energy we need to restore this nation's democracy - and if we all do our part in 2020 to elect leaders who share these values, I know we can make our vision for the country a reality.
That's why I am so excited Reverend Raphael Warnock, a champion for Georgians in the fight for justice, announced he is running for U.S. Senate. Reverend Warnock is a strong leader, a pastor and an advocate - and he would be the first black senator our state has ever elected. **[If you are as ready as I am to support Reverend Warnock's campaign, please give $5 or more right now to become a Founding Donor so we can flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats in 2020.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk112-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**
Reverend Warnock knows the incredible movement we built in Georgia in 2018, and he's determined to build the energy we need all the way to the ballot box in November. He's ready to fight voter suppression, ensure that health care is protected and expanded and break barriers to opportunity so that future generations know that the sky is the limit.
For the past 15 years, I have watched Reverend Warnock lead on issues of social justice, economic access and voting rights. We stood shoulder to shoulder on the toughest fights, against opponents who used their power to belittle and erase their fellow Georgians. He's dedicated his life to public service, and I know _without a doubt_ that he will be a strong advocate for folks in every corner of our state.
**But if we are going to build momentum and flip Georgia blue in 2020, we need to show Reverend Warnock - and a Republican Party that thinks they can steal this seat by spending millions of dollars and suppressing the vote - that we have a grassroots movement strong enough to win. That is why I need supporters like YOU to help us get this campaign off the ground. **
**[So please, friend, will you give $5 now- as much as you can spare - to help Reverend Warnock win this Senate seat, flip Georgia blue and ensure our constitutional rights are protected in the years to come? ](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk112-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**
Thank you for your support.
Stacey Abrams
| [Contribute](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk112-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")
---

In 2018, we built a diverse coalition of hardworking folks from all over Georgia, especially Georgians from marginalized communities who felt unseen and unheard. Our fight was rooted in the belief that poverty is immoral, that Georgians deserve access to affordable health care and that the economy ought to work for everyone. The fact is, people in the White House and the U.S. Senate are failing Georgians of every political party, every race and every region. The Republican Party's divisive agenda - and systematic voter suppression - goes against everything we stand for as Americans. But here's what gives me hope: All around the country, good people - including many folks who have never been involved with politics before - are stepping up to fight back and defend American values. We have the grassroots energy we need to restore this nation's democracy - and if we all do our part in 2020 to elect leaders who share these values, I know we can make our vision for the country a reality. That's why I am so excited Reverend Raphael Warnock, a champion for Georgians in the fight for justice, announced he is running for U.S. Senate. Reverend Warnock is a strong leader, a pastor and an advocate - and he would be the first black senator our state has ever elected. "" Reverend Warnock knows the incredible movement we built in Georgia in 2018, and he's determined to build the energy we need all the way to the ballot box in November. He's ready to fight voter suppression, ensure that health care is protected and expanded and break barriers to opportunity so that future generations know that the sky is the limit. For the past 15 years, I have watched Reverend Warnock lead on issues of social justice, economic access and voting rights. We stood shoulder to shoulder on the toughest fights, against opponents who used their power to belittle and erase their fellow Georgians. He's dedicated his life to public service, and I know without a doubt that he will be a strong advocate for folks in every corner of our state. But if we are going to build momentum and flip Georgia blue in 2020, we need to show Reverend Warnock - and a Republican Party that thinks they can steal this seat by spending millions of dollars and suppressing the vote - that we have a grassroots movement strong enough to win. That is why I need supporters like YOU to help us get this campaign off the ground. "" Thank you for your support. Stacey Abrams | ""

name: Team Michelle
subject: Hear why Tim is proud to be on Team Michelle
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
body:
Throughout her career of service, Michelle has fought for the people of Kansas. No matter where you live, Michelle believes that every Kansan deserves a chance to succeed. But right now, too many people in our district are being left behind and struggling to make ends-meet.

Friends,

Throughout her career of service, Michelle has fought for the people of Kansas. No matter where you live, Michelle believes that every Kansan deserves a chance to succeed. But right now, too many people in our district are being left behind and struggling to make ends-meet.

Michelle is running for Congress so she can lift up the voice of _all_ Kansans, and fight for the issues that matter most to them. That's why Tim from Neosho County is proud to be on Team Michelle. Take a look at what he had to say:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16536883/175757332/-1025822652?gpsid=8_122_12173&refcode=em20_200326_Timstory_fnd_gq_ful__tm_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200326_Timstory_fnd_gq_ful__tm_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWUxYzJkMC04ZjZmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q43UuY2Nl6VI-woan7U8BMhVkdlVBvDgK1k0evi35jg=) _Working in Adult Education, I meet people who are struggling to find their place in an ever-changing economy. Some have worked hard for years, but are suddenly left without the training and education to move forward. Others are young students who had to leave high school early due to unforeseen hardships and financial strain affecting their families.

As a teacher, it is my job to prepare them for the future. That is why I am so excited for Michelle's candidacy. She believes in a future that will include working class people, like my students in Southeast Kansas. Her entire career has been people-focused. She is a leader and she is compassionate. She is exactly who we need to represent us in the Second District.

\--Tim Tarkelly, ABE Instructor, Neosho County _

Thanks,

Team Michelle

****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16536885/175757334/-1025822652?gpsid=8_122_12173&refcode=em20_200326_Timstory_fnd_gq_ful__tm_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200326_Timstory_fnd_gq_ful__tm_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWUxYzJkMC04ZjZmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q43UuY2Nl6VI-woan7U8BMhVkdlVBvDgK1k0evi35jg=)****

name: Team Booker
subject: More powerful than the establishment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
The FEC fundraising deadline is in five days. We can't afford to fall short.
#
89 days.
In 89 days, Kentuckians will decide who is our best shot to defeat Mitch and to fight for the issues that matter most to people. That means **this is our last full quarter of fundraising before the primary.**
You may have read from our previous emails that the FEC fundraising deadline is in five days – March 31. We can’t afford to fall short of our fundraising goal of $20,000 before the end of the month.
**[So we're asking everyone: can you rush $5 (or whatever you can) to our campaign to make sure Charles pulls off a grassroots victory in the primary and goes on to defeat Mitch?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16537422/175763561/957603293?refcode=em20200326&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjM2OTc3OS05MjZmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ImApKteiTjuElMqd-0i9cwAYnx4QFu80-y2G58sq7NA=)**
****[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16537423/175763562/957603293?refcode=em20200326&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjM2OTc3OS05MjZmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ImApKteiTjuElMqd-0i9cwAYnx4QFu80-y2G58sq7NA=)****
We'll be honest. We're expecting to be outspent in the primary by the Democratic establishment in favor of their favorite pick to go up against Mitch McConnell.
But if we put up a milquetoast Democratic nominee to go up against Mitch in November, we're setting ourselves up to lose _again._ **And this time around, we really can't afford to lose.**
While the establishment has money and corporate interests, our campaign has something more: normal, everyday, working Kentuckians who want to see an economy that works for them. And when it comes down to building a grassroots movement like ours, that's more powerful than super PAC money or big-name endorsements.
**[Join our small-dollar, people-led grassroots movement today to help elect Charles and defeat Mitch in November. Please give $5, $10, $15 – or whatever you can – so we can meet our FEC fundraising goal of $20,000 and keep this movement going strong.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16537424/175763563/957603293?refcode=em20200326&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjM2OTc3OS05MjZmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ImApKteiTjuElMqd-0i9cwAYnx4QFu80-y2G58sq7NA=)**
\- Team Booker
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16537425/175763564/-640535987?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjM2OTc3OS05MjZmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ImApKteiTjuElMqd-0i9cwAYnx4QFu80-y2G58sq7NA=&emci=37d968ea-826f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=52369779-926f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16537426/175763565/-778353598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjM2OTc3OS05MjZmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ImApKteiTjuElMqd-0i9cwAYnx4QFu80-y2G58sq7NA=&emci=37d968ea-826f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=52369779-926f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16537427/175763566/-1403296926?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjM2OTc3OS05MjZmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ImApKteiTjuElMqd-0i9cwAYnx4QFu80-y2G58sq7NA=&emci=37d968ea-826f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=52369779-926f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570)

name: Adem Bunkeddeko
subject: It’s official -- we’re on the ballot
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/qD4QpfOPMMsjvZjVv9TByzLYjcJbJ4Zi3bZugYuuD_I=/TcWjgiZevL2j0BoJk_qLSjCG32ZH_ILLXSqmM-8MCQA=)

Peter,

During these extremely challenging times, I thought I would share some good news that our volunteer community made possible. Thanks to all of your hard work and support, **I 'm thrilled to share that we've officially secured our spot on the ballot for the upcoming primary elections**. Collecting enough signatures to appear on the ballot was never going to be easy, but our team and supporters like you ensured that everyone who signed could do so safely.

**[Getting on the primary ballot is a _huge_ step for our campaign -- so if you're financially able to do so, will you chip in today and help us keep the momentum going?](https://act.myngp.com/el/qD4QpfOPMMsjvZjVv9TByzLYjcJbJ4Zi3bZugYuuD_I=/386KmgjNpy2iDL8XB5nqcgihs1JGMbI7bC3Negdek-o=)**

_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
******[Express Donate: $200](https://act.myngp.com/el/qD4QpfOPMMsjvZjVv9TByzLYjcJbJ4Zi3bZugYuuD_I=/386KmgjNpy2iDL8XB5nqcgihs1JGMbI7bC3Negdek-o=?express_lane=true&amount=200&refcode=express_lane_200)******
******[Express Donate: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/qD4QpfOPMMsjvZjVv9TByzLYjcJbJ4Zi3bZugYuuD_I=/386KmgjNpy2iDL8XB5nqcgihs1JGMbI7bC3Negdek-o=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100)******
******[Express Donate: $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/qD4QpfOPMMsjvZjVv9TByzLYjcJbJ4Zi3bZugYuuD_I=/386KmgjNpy2iDL8XB5nqcgihs1JGMbI7bC3Negdek-o=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50)******
******[Or, donate another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/qD4QpfOPMMsjvZjVv9TByzLYjcJbJ4Zi3bZugYuuD_I=/386KmgjNpy2iDL8XB5nqcgihs1JGMbI7bC3Negdek-o=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other)******

Petitioning may be over, but our outreach is just getting started. And since we can no longer knock every door, we've got to get creative in how we connect with voters -- that means making more phone calls, sending more texts, hosting online events, and investing in digital advertising to get the word out across Brooklyn that our campaign is the one fighting for progressive change. But first, we need the resources to go fully digital.

**[These are really difficult times, but if you're able to give, will you donate whatever you can today before our end-of-quarter deadline on Tuesday, March 31st?](https://act.myngp.com/el/qD4QpfOPMMsjvZjVv9TByzLYjcJbJ4Zi3bZugYuuD_I=/386KmgjNpy2iDL8XB5nqcgihs1JGMbI7bC3Negdek-o=)**

Best,
Adem

name: Senate Battleground 2020 (via Voter Protection Project)
subject: Susan Collins wants you to forget this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
---
| | We MUST make November 2020 the END OF THE ROAD for Susan Collins' political career. [](https://go.protectvoting.?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_collins_mar2020?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200326_Collins2009_U2_X2&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200326_Collins2009_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_200326_Collins2009_U2_X2") Republican Senator Susan Collins pushed hard for Mitch McConnell's stimulus bill, which would have created a no-strings-attached $550 billion slush fund. She said: "We don't have another minute to delay acting!" Yet in the 2009 negotiations for the last stimulus bill, **Collins STRIPPED OUT $870 million for pandemic preparedness.** "What does that have to do with an economic stimulus package?" she whined to CNN. This is yet another example of our country SUFFERING because of Senator Collins' poor judgment. **(Don 't forget her votes for the GOP tax bill, for the impeachment cover-up, and for Brett Kavanaugh!) ** [**We MUST make November 2020 the END OF THE ROAD for Susan Collins ' political career. Our Senate Battleground Fund is closing in on 8,000 grassroots contributions -- can you help hit our end-of-quarter goal and help defeat Collins this year?**](https://go.protectvoting.?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_collins_mar2020?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200326_Collins2009_U2_X2&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2+-+We+MUST+make+November+2020+the+END+OF+TH&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200326_Collins2009_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_200326_Collins2009_U2_X2") | | | [DEFEAT COLLINS](https://go.protectvoting.?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_collins_mar2020?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200326_Collins2009_U2_X2&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+DEFEAT+COLLINS&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200326_Collins2009_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_200326_Collins2009_U2_X2")
---

Even afterward, Senator Collins was PROUD of stripping pandemic funding from the stimulus bill.

As _The Nation_ reported shortly after the vote: "Even now, Collins continues to use her official website to highlight the fact that she led the fight to strip the pandemic preparedness money out of the Senate's version of the stimulus measure."

Fortunately, we have a dynamic Democratic challenger in Sara Gideon, Maine's Speaker of the House.

**Sara Gideon is spooking the GOP so much that Mitch McConnell 's Super PAC just plunked down $7.2 MILLION to prop up Collins!**

clean_body: | | We MUST make November 2020 the END OF THE ROAD for Susan Collins' political career. "" Republican Senator Susan Collins pushed hard for Mitch McConnell's stimulus bill, which would have created a no-strings-attached $550 billion slush fund. She said: "We don't have another minute to delay acting!" Yet in the 2009 negotiations for the last stimulus bill, Collins STRIPPED OUT $870 million for pandemic preparedness. "What does that have to do with an economic stimulus package?" she whined to CNN. This is yet another example of our country SUFFERING because of Senator Collins' poor judgment. (Don 't forget her votes for the GOP tax bill, for the impeachment cover-up, and for Brett Kavanaugh!) "" | | | "" Even afterward, Senator Collins was PROUD of stripping pandemic funding from the stimulus bill. As The Nation reported shortly after the vote: "Even now, Collins continues to use her official website to highlight the fact that she led the fight to strip the pandemic preparedness money out of the Senate's version of the stimulus measure." Fortunately, we have a dynamic Democratic challenger in Sara Gideon, Maine's Speaker of the House. Sara Gideon is spooking the GOP so much that Mitch McConnell 's Super PAC just plunked down $7.2 MILLION to prop up Collins! "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" Thank you so much, \-- the Voter Protection Project | "" | | Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Time for Democrats to Unite on Coronavirus Aid Bill
body:
The Senate did its job. So has the President. It’s time for House Democrats to do theirs. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a32694e505&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Time for Democrats to Unite on Coronavirus Aid Bill**

“Our country, you might have noticed, is in a crisis caused by a virus that started in China and has circled the world,” John Crudele writes in the _New York Post_. Americans have made clear the one thing they need quickly: financial relief from Washington.

“The Senate has already passed a $2 trillion bailout after an agreement with the White House. The House could have voted on the bill Wednesday but it didn’t. Nancy Pelosi, the Democratic Speaker of the House, might get around to it today. Or maybe not.”

The Senate did its job. So has the President. It’s time for House Democrats to do theirs.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=06f86e2662&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “The China-caused coronavirus is sweeping the globe, and America's journalists are losing their minds . . . CNN and NBC, for example, were recently cited by Chinese state-run media in an effort to downplay China's responsibility for the pandemic,” Andrew Stiles writes in [_The Washington Free Beacon_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4af02bc4ed&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “People across the United States are taking steps to help one another amid the coronavirus pandemic. From companies donating masks and ventilators to hospitals, to everyday people helping their neighbors, there are countless examples of people trying to do the right thing during an extraordinarily difficult time.” Read more in [_The Hill_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ee1a85c1be&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Talk about a lack of self-awareness. In a report this week acknowledging China’s disinformation campaign to absolve the Chinese Communist Party of any culpability for its mishandling of the COVID-19 pandemic, CNN also repeated the Beijing-approved talking point that it is racist to refer to the disease by its city and country of origin,” Becket Adams writes in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=92e01d79ef&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b4d83edb94&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=de33abd1af&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=aca0a23aee)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: Here's what the relief package means for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2e431/6cd27893/539bd344/15904f91/3805960253/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | We have reached a bipartisan agreement on a relief package for families impacted by the coronavirus -- that is, all of us. It has passed in the Senate, the House should follow quickly, and the President has said he will sign the bill. At two trillion dollars, it is the largest relief package in history. Coming to an agreement was challenging, as many corporate interests and their allies in the White House and the Republican caucus sought to extract goodies for themselves and to remove oversight provisions. **But Democrats were united and forced many improvements.** Personally, I fought to ensure that small businesses would be provided fully-forgivable loans that provide a bridge over the abyss that we're facing, and keep workers employed as much as possible. I fought to ensure a massive surge of funding -- a Marshall Plan -- for our hospitals and health care system, including critical provisions to support nurses. This bill includes funding to support child care assistance for front line medical staff, first responders, sanitation workers and other essential workers; funding for affordable housing and homelessness assistance; and funding for schools and colleges to keep our students learning safely. **Most working and middle-class families will receive a check for $1200 per adult and $500 per child in the next few weeks. It's not enough, but it's a start.** Individuals who receive unemployment benefits will see a boost of $600/week above current benefit levels, and it will include self-employed workers, contractors, and gig workers as well. And we've established critical oversight to ensure that when funds are made available to major corporations, the American people can know where the money is going and what it's intended to do. Businesses that accept federal loans must protect their workers and may not engage in stock buybacks. ****On a personal level, thank you for the many notes expressing concern about my well being.**** In the Senate, almost all of our staff is on a work-from-home status. Like many of you, we're mostly communicating through email, phone calls, and video calls. We're minimizing votes on the floor, and when we do vote, we walk in and walk out -- keeping a safe distance from each other. I feel healthy and strong.******** Things look pretty dark, but we're going to get through this. We'll do what it takes to stop the spread of the coronavirus and we'll do everything we can to rebuild our economy and protect families. Onward. ****_Jeff_**** ****Express Donate:**** If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | ****[$5](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2e431/6cd27893/539bd344/15904f8e/3805960253/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2020-03-26-covidpackage&refcode2=express-buttons")**** | ****[$15](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2e431/6cd27893/539bd344/15904f8f/3805960253/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2020-03-26-covidpackage&refcode2=express-buttons")**** | ****[$25](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2e431/6cd27893/539bd344/15904f8c/3805960253/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2020-03-26-covidpackage&refcode2=express-buttons")**** | ****[$50](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2e431/6cd27893/539bd344/15904f8d/3805960253/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2020-03-26-covidpackage&refcode2=express-buttons")****

name: Melissa Hortman
subject: COVID-19 assistance passes the Minnesota House
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/92PnNTfIri53mn77klk1-AL_5Kv9yKnu9R_YFv7q-KE=/WdR4roUUdH01NGgymNEazr-GBA6K0cZ8vXZ68kSaqBI=?refcode=032620)
| | Friend, First and foremost I want to wish you and your family health and safety in this unprecedented time. Second, **I want to send you an update on action taken in the Minnesota House of Representatives this afternoon.** Minnesotans are facing significant medical concerns and financial hardships as a result of the COVID-19 pandemic. Today we took bipartisan action to safeguard our health and economic safety. _Learn more about the bill_[ _here_](https://act.myngp.com/el/92PnNTfIri53mn77klk1-AL_5Kv9yKnu9R_YFv7q-KE=/uBR8S_umQq7qb6SecwYVqNdi9Zk7rJOnqHiQsvhjIgs=) _._ There is still a lot more work ahead of us and this is just one step towards addressing the health and economic crisis brought on by COVID-19. As this pandemic continues to unfold we know there is more we will have to do to tackle the long-term consequences of COVID-19. In the meantime, we will be working hard, monitoring, and preparing for whatever may come our way. As always, your input is appreciated. Please stay in touch with your [State Representatives](https://act.myngp.com/el/92PnNTfIri53mn77klk1-AL_5Kv9yKnu9R_YFv7q-KE=/nSUYb573bVnxhD13lEeCffrDjTWHMnv-kTslMaPVaHc=) during the pandemic through email, phone, virtual town halls and public briefings, legislator newsletters, [House committee listservs](https://act.myngp.com/el/92PnNTfIri53mn77klk1-AL_5Kv9yKnu9R_YFv7q-KE=/XAoHqfzn-3J_qcuLz2FfLKwAOL1n-8W_nZK0Ja_OOm4=), and [House Public Information](https://act.myngp.com/el/92PnNTfIri53mn77klk1-AL_5Kv9yKnu9R_YFv7q-KE=/1VTsBA_Jfv-4Br68W4ysXr4FX72ZY2HhMjqeSA9uRSk=). We will keep you updated with the latest developments. Thank you, **Melissa Hortman** Speaker Minnesota House of Representatives [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/92PnNTfIri53mn77klk1-AL_5Kv9yKnu9R_YFv7q-KE=/WdR4roUUdH01NGgymNEazr-GBA6K0cZ8vXZ68kSaqBI=?refcode=032620)
---
| Prepared and paid for by the DFL House Caucus.

Saint Paul MN 55107 United States

name: Team Booker
subject: An important update from the Senate on COVID-19
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
body:
Cory's fighting to get help immediately to those who need it most. |
#
Team, Cory's been very busy in Washington these past few weeks -- fighting to expand COVID-19 testing, secure personal protective equipment for our health care workers, and much, much more to flatten the curve and reduce the spread of this harmful virus. He's also been fighting to help workers, families, and small businesses impacted by the economic fallout of this crisis. In addition to the rising number of infections across our country, the economic impact of this global health challenge has been dramatic. A crisis of this magnitude clearly requires bold action from the federal government to keep workers afloat. **There 's a major bipartisan relief package that passed the Senate late last night and is moving through Congress this week. Here's what's in the proposal, what Cory has been fighting for, and how it will help address the health and economic impacts we're all feeling right now:**
* **A "Marshall Plan for Hospitals."** The relief package includes billions in funding for America's health care system -- an important priority that Cory had been advocating for. This will make sure that hospitals and health care providers have billions of dollars in additional resources to support frontline workers and save lives during this public health crisis.

* **A historic expansion of unemployment benefits.** Cory and his Democratic colleagues successfully helped secure the largest expansion of unemployment insurance in decades -- which will cover four months of enhanced benefits for workers who've lost their jobs during the economic downturn. It amounts to an additional $600 per week of benefits for workers who have been laid off or seen their hours reduced.

* **Direct cash payments.** Cory pushed for immediate and significant cash payments to American workers and families to help stimulate the economy and put money in the pocket of people who need it most. A version of his idea is included in the relief package -- the legislation will provide $1,200 per adult and $500 per child for most Americans.

* **Essential aid for small businesses.** Cory believes that small businesses are the backbone of the American economy. As a result of his efforts alongside Senate Democrats, this bill includes $350 billion in loan forgiveness grants for small businesses to cover their payroll and other necessary expenses.

* **Resources for HBCUs and other minority-serving institutions.** Cory called for emergency funding for HBCUs and additional minority-serving institutions, which is included in the relief package -- providing much-needed resources to these establishments that are pillars of stability and strength in the communities they serve.

It's clear that much more work will need to be done in the coming weeks to rescue our economy and save as many lives as possible. But for now, this relief bill needs to be passed by Congress and signed into law by the President as soon as possible so we can provide immediate assistance to those most in need. These are uncertain times, but we will rise to meet this challenge together. Stay safe out there and we'll be in touch with more updates soon. Team Booker

P.S. **[Here's a clip of Cory on MSNBC this week talking about his work to improve federal relief efforts](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f92/5fca0d19/7a40201e/291d1d92/1759324182/VEsH/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hxiYXFYEqk4&feature=youtu.be")**.
[](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f92/5fca0d19/7a40201e/291d1d92/1759324182/VEsE/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hxiYXFYEqk4&feature=youtu.be") **Here are important resources to refer to during this public health emergency:
[www.cdc.gov/coronavirus](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f92/5fca0d19/7a40201e/291d1d91/1759324182/VEsF/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus")
[www.covid19.nj.gov](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f92/5fca0d19/7a40201e/291d1d90/1759324182/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://www.covid19.nj.gov")
[www.jobs.covid19.nj.gov](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f92/5fca0d19/7a40201e/291d1d9f/1759324182/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://www.jobs.covid19.nj.gov")**

_We know this is a difficult time for many folks.
If you'd like to receive less emails during this public health crisis, [**please click here**. ](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f92/5fca0d19/7a40201e/291d1d9e/1759324182/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails")_

---

Resources for HBCUs and other minority-serving institutions. Cory called for emergency funding for HBCUs and additional minority-serving institutions, which is included in the relief package -- providing much-needed resources to these establishments that are pillars of stability and strength in the communities they serve. It's clear that much more work will need to be done in the coming weeks to rescue our economy and save as many lives as possible. But for now, this relief bill needs to be passed by Congress and signed into law by the President as soon as possible so we can provide immediate assistance to those most in need. These are uncertain times, but we will rise to meet this challenge together. Stay safe out there and we'll be in touch with more updates soon. Team Booker P.S. "". "" Here are important resources to refer to during this public health emergency: "" "" ""** We know this is a difficult time for many folks. If you'd like to receive less emails during this public health crisis, "" PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE ""

name: Nina Ahmad
subject: REMINDER: Join Dr. Nina Ahmad tonight at 7:00 pm for a community dialogue focused on COVID-19
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for PA
body:
**Join us tonight **

**For a educational community ****dialogue **
**focused on the COVID-19 epidemic**
**Call-in line (571) 620-0368**

**Who: **
Dr. Nina Ahmad, Ph.D
Congressman Brendan Boyle
Dr. Walter Tsou, MD
Dr. Ellen Tedaldi
Congressman Dwight Evans
Sec. Treasurer Salima Pace, 1199C

**What: **
Dr. Nina Ahmad, Ph.D is hosting, along with leading physicians, health care experts and two members of Congress, a robust virtual telephone town hall to reach out to an estimated 100,000 state and area residents across telephone and social media channels for an educational community dialogue focused on the COVID-19 epidemic (the Coronavirus) this Thursday night.
**When:**
Tonight, Thursday, March 26, 2020 7:00 pm to 8:00 pm

_The experts and participants:_
**Host:** Dr. Nina Ahmad holds a Doctorate in Chemistry from the University of Pennsylvania and earned a postdoctoral fellowship in Molecular Genetics from Thomas Jefferson University. A respected scientist, Dr. Nina's work led to treatments for diseases affecting children and the elderly and she earned a prestigious fellowship at Wills Eye Hospital. Dr. Nina Ahmad previously advised the Obama Administration as well as most recently served as a Deputy Mayor in Philadelphia. Dr. Nina is a life-long community advocate and served as a local President for the National Organization for Women (NOW). Dr. Nina is a leading candidate for Auditor General. If elected, she would become the first-woman of color EVER elected to state-wide executive office in the Commonwealth's 233-year old history. In response to this pandemic, Dr. Nina is sponsoring and hosting this unique virtual event.

**Special Guests for this virtual tele town-hall include: **
* **Congressman Brendan Boyle** represents the 2nd Pennsylvania congressional district, which includes parts of Philadelphia and Montgomery County. He currently serves on the powerful House Ways and Means Committee and the House Committee on the Budget. He is the founder and co-chair of the "Blue Collar Caucus" which advocates for working families by addressing wage stagnation, job insecurity, and the future of work.

* **Dr. Walter Tsou** , MD, MPH is a past president of the American Public Health Association and former health commissioner of Philadelphia. He is a founding member of the National Board of Public Health Examiners and a board adviser to Physicians for a National Health Program.
* **Dr. Ellen Tedaldi** , MD, MACP is a Professor, Medicine Director of the HIV Program, at the Lewis Katz School of Medicine/Temple University Hospital. She is recognized by peers as one of the best doctors in America ([https://www.bestdoctors.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/ymdYCMk0penSA3HgbhMWlfrKlVHfRkhoMWzp8WH2fRM=/G4zE2E8-WLcb8xCX1liG1QO58hhe-Af-cjs4XInOX48=)) with a specialization in internal medicine.

* **Congressman Dwight Evans** represents the 3rd District of Pennsylvania which includes portions of Philadelphia County. Congressman Evans serves on the House Ways and Means Committee, including its Subcommittee on Health, and as vice chair of the House Small Business Committee. He is continuing to push for robust funding for healthcare, housing and small businesses in coronavirus legislation.

* **Salima Pace **is Secretary-Treasurer at 1199C District of Philadelphia, an affiliate of the National Union of Hospital and Health Care Employees, AFSCME, AFL-CIO. 1199C has represented more than 17,000 members representing workers in all fields in the major health care institutions.

**How to join us: **Dr. Nina is available for interviews, on-camera web-ex/zoom along with other experts following the virtual town hall. Please contact us below to arrange and schedule to accommodate your requests. We have a listen-only line for you to use for ALL media:

Additionally, please visit us on Facebook for video of the event at: [https://www.facebook.com/NinaforPA/](https://act.myngp.com/el/ymdYCMk0penSA3HgbhMWlfrKlVHfRkhoMWzp8WH2fRM=/kG5R1uXQPDufs_2ttCuxCoKCWcnsgc7ygzovN0RQv4Q=). For any questions contact us at:
* Joe Shields, Esq. [joe@ninaforpa.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/ymdYCMk0penSA3HgbhMWlfrKlVHfRkhoMWzp8WH2fRM=/2EBL5Y-3KEJMeyCVpp3YciZ0aVI7NqKssZ8oDWPUexs=), 973-270-7615
* Mark Nevins, [mark@doverstrategygroup.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/ymdYCMk0penSA3HgbhMWlfrKlVHfRkhoMWzp8WH2fRM=/JfUyDwz0irNEvgNbJGQSpP1DbFQr5wS6sBrWORoKMQM=), 267-847-7189
* Ken Snyder, [ken@spmediagroup.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/ymdYCMk0penSA3HgbhMWlfrKlVHfRkhoMWzp8WH2fRM=/C2deajtjJcoXS94qob8t-WGo9StozirHzl25EJLAX7w=), 312-550-3377

Paid for by Nina for PA
---
Nina for PA
PO Box 40681
Philadelphia PA 19107 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/ymdYCMk0penSA3HgbhMWlfrKlVHfRkhoMWzp8WH2fRM=/zcoF9KpN0cJ5know7A3fLTpY9pO5to2-KcmLzwXEmEU=).

name: PELOSI BIRTHDAY CARD (Team BRL)
subject: 📎SIGN: Nancy Pelosi’s birthday card →
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
Sign Speaker Pelosi's card to wish her a happy birthday, and thank her for everything she is doing to keep us safe.
---
| | [25,000 BIRTHDAY WISHES NEEDED: Today, our beloved Speaker of the House turns 80! Nancy is spending every second of her birthday fighting to keep us safe. Will you sign her card before midnight to thank her for everything she's doing for us? >>](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b62e/18e32a7f/4eee8d3e/7b220a12/3252501018/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/pelosi-birthday-card-email?source=20200326_em_pet_b1_pelosibday_nat_ia") Nancy Pelosi is the most incredible Speaker of our lifetime.

And today is her [**80th**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b62e/18e32a7f/4eee8d3e/7b220a12/3252501018/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/pelosi-birthday-card-email?source=20200326_em_pet_b1_pelosibday_nat_ia") birthday!

But instead of celebrating -- Nancy is fighting with everything she has to keep us safe during these challenging times. **[_Which is why Ben Ray wants to make Nancy's birthday extra special -- by surprising her with a card signed by 25,000 well-wishers! We know Nancy will be so touched to see your name. Will you sign before midnight? >>_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b62e/18e32a7f/4eee8d3e/7b220a12/3252501018/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/pelosi-birthday-card-email?source=20200326_em_pet_b1_pelosibday_nat_ia")** | [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b62e/18e32a7f/4eee8d3e/7b220a12/3252501018/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/pelosi-birthday-card-email?source=20200326_em_pet_b1_pelosibday_nat_ia")

There's no doubt about it:

We are so lucky to have Speaker Pelosi fighting for us.

[**Before midnight, will you help Ben Ray gather 25,000 birthday signatures to make Speaker Pelosi's day extra special?**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b62e/18e32a7f/4eee8d3e/7b220a12/3252501018/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/pelosi-birthday-card-email?source=20200326_em_pet_b1_pelosibday_nat_ia")

Thank you,

Team BRL

Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement? **[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b62e/18e32a7f/4eee8d3e/7b220a16/3252501018/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
