subject: Hirsh Singh Wins Cumberland and Atlantic Counties!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SINGH FOR SENATE
body:
Singh's win comes on the back of his wins in Ocean County and Cape May County and momentum is now solidly on his side... | | | Dear Friend, Our campaign is gaining _massive_ momentum. We just won Cumberland and Atlantic County! That means we have secured President Trump's Republican strongholds in the state.

Due to COVID-19, we need to collect 1,000 signatures on our electronic petition by Friday to be on the ballot with President Trump. We need your help and it takes less than a minute!
## If you're a registered Republican or unaffiliated please sign our [ballot petition](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=045d75e4e9&e=3e017fab0f).

We also just released a** powerful** [exposé on Rikin Mehta, our Democrat in disguise](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=1dad6f3a8a&e=3e017fab0f) opponent. It is completely melting away any and all support that the establishment had fabricated for our opponent. The truth is, we now have all the momentum and are going to first win in June and then make history by winning with President Trump in November! Sincerely,
The Singh for Senate Team **P.S. **Attached below is our latest press release, detailing Hirsh Singh’s recent victories. Thank you for your continued support!
---
| | [ ](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=05eb27e396&e=3e017fab0f)
---
|
---
| March 25th, 2020
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
Contact: [press@hirshsingh.com](mailto:press@hirshsingh.com?subject=RE%3A%2011-09-19%20Press%20Release)
---
| |
# Hirsh Singh Wins Cumberland and Atlantic Counties

**Linwood, NJ** — Conservative U.S. Senate candidate Hirsh Singh continued to demonstrate his overwhelming support in the most Republican areas of New Jersey by winning the endorsement of the Republican Party organizations of Cumberland County and Atlantic County.

Singh's win comes on the back of his wins in Ocean County and Cape May County, and momentum is now solidly on his side. An analysis of Hirsh Singh's support base clearly shows that all his support is from committed Republicans who represent their constituents while his opponent has been propped up by the party elite who had opposed Donald Trump's candidacy in 2016.

Bergen County Republican Party's convention has been canceled and looks like it will not endorse any candidate, but Singh was expected to win there as he had with Ocean County. A consistent pattern that has emerged in this year's election in New Jersey is that the pro-Trump Republicans are up against the anti-Trump elite who control the state's party machinery. The former tends to vote for Singh while his opponent has been gifted the nomination wherever the party leadership had its way.

Singh expressed satisfaction after the outcome of the Atlantic County convention and vowed to take along everyone regardless of whether they had voted for him or not.

"I thank the members of the Atlantic County committee and would like to reach out to everyone — including those who voted against me — so that we can work together to make New Jersey and America great," said Singh.
###
---
| For any inquiries, please reply to this message or send an email to: [press@hirshsingh.com](mailto:press@hirshsingh.com?subject=RE%3A%2011-09-19%20Press%20Release)

Additional information is available on our [official website](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=4061553d71&e=3e017fab0f) and [Facebook](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=a52fec2c7e&e=3e017fab0f) page.

Thank you,
**The Singh for Senate Press Team**
_For the People_

name: John Hutchison for WV Supreme Court
subject: Why is John running to keep his seat on the WV Supreme Court
body:
I'm running for the West Virginia Supreme Court of Appeals because we must restore confidence in a judiciary wracked by scandal and tainted by politics. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16544388/175831095/-1172787226?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTE3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTVlODlmZC1hZDZmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3ZquZT4RjoX_L71QorLvR5UwmR9KT2ef31Df2eUOn2U=&emci=34263f4c-7469-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&emdi=355e89fd-ad6f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=4846285) |

| "I'm running for the West Virginia Supreme Court of Appeals because we must restore confidence in a judiciary wracked by scandal and tainted by politics. Given the threat to our society and our institutions posed by the coronavirus, I think it is more important than ever that we elect candidates who have the experience, temperament and vision to serve fairly and impartially on the high court. Our citizens need to know that their court system is being administered by people of honor and integrity. That's the kind of judge I've been and that's the kind of justice I'll continue to be if I'm returned to the court." ~ Supreme Court Justice John Hutchison Make a Donation today and help Keep Justice Hutchison on the WV Supreme Court. name: Tina Smith
subject: update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Hi there, I wanted to give you a quick update on the work I am doing in the Senate to help Minnesotans during this unprecedented crisis. As you may already know, the Senate passed a bipartisan coronavirus bill last night — offering some much-needed relief to American families, small businesses, hospitals, and local and state governments. Some of the highlights of the bill include:
* **Unemployment benefits** will be extended and expanded to help more workers
* **Forgivable loans** will be available to support small businesses and nonprofits
* **Hospitals will get a significant increase** in funding to support their services
* **Providers will receive increased Medicare payments** to get critical funding
* **New investments** will be made in COVID-19 research and in medical supplies
* There will be **worker and transparency protections** on government loans

During these negotiations, I fought tirelessly to ensure families, small businesses, and our health care workers were getting the resources they needed. I championed portions of the legislation that would ensure private insurance plans cover a COVID-19 vaccine without cost-sharing when it becomes available. I fought hard to put in place measures that would prevent drug shortages and protect our medical supply chain. I helped secure $3.5 billion in additional funding for child care assistance for frontline workers and made sure we are supporting our rural and telehealth programs. And I fought to secure more than $8 billion in critical funding for tribes and the Indian Health Service. **But this is just the first step.** As this public health and economic crisis deepens, I will continue to be a resource for all Minnesotans and fight for the needs of our communities. I will do everything in my power to work with state and local officials to ensure our families, hospitals, local governments, businesses, and community programs get the support they have been promised. I know the hard work is just getting started, and I am rolling up my sleeves to fiercely advocate on behalf of everyone. Trust me — I am not done fighting for you. I hope you and your loved ones are staying healthy and safe. — Tina [**P.S. I know this is an unprecedented time for many families, but if you have any change to spare, I hope you will consider pitching in to Meals on Wheels — an organization working on the frontlines of this pandemic. Please, only give if you can afford to do so.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16544774/175835097/17034053?refcode=em200326-bill&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,1000&firstname=&lastname=&email=&addr1=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2RlNTM2NS1hZjZmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=okyjV_m17Y5aLaMv9OiWugG_Zqxd5i1MB-dpPztOLEs=)

name: Charles Booker
subject: I’ve seen this before
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
The truth is, people have needed a bailout for generations. The COVID-19 pandemic is now shedding light on these long-felt struggles and the absence of support for Americans who need help the most.
#
I know what it looks like when the bottom falls out.
My zip code has been the poorest in Kentucky for years. People where I’m from know about industries leaving, small businesses closing down, not affording food, utilities being cut off, rationing medication, and homelessness. Unemployment levels have been as high as 30%.
**The truth is, people have needed a bailout for generations.** The COVID-19 pandemic is now shedding light on these long-felt struggles and the absence of support for Americans who need help the most.
**We have a shot now this election to create the change working people have dreamed about for years.** This is our best chance in years to defeat Mitch McConnell and replace him with a leader who will fight for an economy that works for all of us.
**[Will you chip in to join our fight? We know these are difficult times, but even $5 makes a huge difference in supporting our progressive movement.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16545731/175846232/-1791507362?refcode=em20200326-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTM3ZDQyNC1iMzZmLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ro6uvpUQXR2OkLSTcnM4AUoxEUi2PUK01Ivwlktne0o=)**

clean_body: The truth is, people have needed a bailout for generations. The COVID-19 pandemic is now shedding light on these long-felt struggles and the absence of support for Americans who need help the most. I know what it looks like when the bottom falls out. My zip code has been the poorest in Kentucky for years. People where I’m from know about industries leaving, small businesses closing down, not affording food, utilities being cut off, rationing medication, and homelessness. Unemployment levels have been as high as 30%. The truth is, people have needed a bailout for generations. The COVID-19 pandemic is now shedding light on these long-felt struggles and the absence of support for Americans who need help the most. We have a shot now this election to create the change working people have dreamed about for years. This is our best chance in years to defeat Mitch McConnell and replace him with a leader who will fight for an economy that works for all of us. = **= We’ve reached a turning point in this crisis. A record number of Americans are filing for unemployment, hospitals are being flooded with patients they don’t have the resources to treat, and our country is on the brink of another great depression. Apparently, this isn’t enough motivation for Mitch to start doing his job. He’s still more worried about what his corporate donors think than the number of families that will be devastated by this pandemic. We deserve better. You deserve better. Change starts with defeating Mitch this November. = Change is within reach, Charles P.S. My heart goes out to anyone struggling right now to make ends meet. Please take care of yourself — I only ask you to donate if you can afford to. Your support already means a lot to us. =** | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Tiffany Shedd
subject: Campaign Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee
body:
Friends, Right now, there is nothing more urgent than the Coronavirus, its economic affect and the rapid changes and uncertainty it has brought to all our lives. The **short term** goal is to eradicate the virus and get Americans back to work. During this time, I have spent hours on the phone checking in with people, texting people, connecting through email and social media. There is no doubt many are hurting right now. However, hearing from so many there are some common themes.
* Even through personal hardships Arizonans still want to reach out to help their neighbors and their communities;
* We know that we can beat this virus and continue the great American comeback – it’s just a matter of time;
* We are all in this together and that makes us stronger, kinder, and more creative problem solvers.

The important **long term** goal is to make sure our district, state, and nation have good leadership. Leadership that puts Americans first, values individual life and individual liberties, and stands against socialism and open borders. While I strongly supported President Trump during the good times, I am thankful daily for the leadership he has shown during these tough times. It is important we elect a representative for AZ01 who supports our President and his pro-American policies. My team and I made the decision to cancel ALL in person events, including campaign fundraisers. However, while our world may have changed, deadlines don't. Our FEC fundraising deadline ends on March 31st. If you are able to contribute, I am asking you to help me show that while we are dealing with the **short term** goal of beating Coronavirus, we have not taken our eye off the **long term** goal of taking back AZ01 and stopping the socialist agenda. Stay safe, stay well, and stay strong.

Tiffany Shedd [ **CONTRIBUTE** ](http://links.sheddforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=751347c0a24f4ac69eb340d816860dae&_e=fOuD3NVAZzUkqL2e29A6Uvl4d-zBEL-zWf2A2Dg_Fl1AW3a_tPPx7MTa9bmhe1HcAUPbor_EGgQJOuTqgXQkx5nFdsbrYYkAnFKqNbhzeLIvWnAMob2i2LMcqoSrSgmbpz9Za3GMENpddqIj_b28VSDgFGmSsWEwvOso7n2f-VSFD2sTqnMhLnvDkHRsC4kIKLiNBxLsiNtP06cXSPRqGZLmC_01NB_fwS1zks7HbDfW0_QnnSY4Su4zn1cI6hxfzGv6gZLnnLxl2tnZeGtEyVrKoVm2I6iiP8-7VGo4x7s0_xgBZwIoRKsY_EivpGuTjohDkBug-qbFRwTywD1E64Snlrfqz9zdXX9dMoUxMQ4iC3uyZZw73dlnKBN5c6PwhNg5c0qNOusG3YbjcqBoK9gbAn3dOog3Cqzp4ENsoV2ZKcx52EUqyIQF57Pj4Rrs) Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee

name: Laura Loomer
subject: This Congresswoman is Chilling at Home as Americans Die
body:
There's too much to be done, too many lives to save, too many families that need the help of the community.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-369538-867701-4927881-fa68f17fc3-2f4279fe31)
Patriot,

There's too much to be done, too many lives to save, too many families that need the help of the community.

If it's not clear, we're in a crisis.

But tell that to my opponent Lois Frankel. Here she is on Twitter chilling out in her home in Florida . . .

Today, the Senate passed a $2 trillion aid package for Americans and businesses around the country.

The bill should be RUSHED to the House for a vote, but guess what? **They 're not there!**

**Just like Lois Frankel, Democrats are spread around the nation, taking a break while saying they 're "social distancing."**

**This is insane!**

Americans need help right now! President Trump knows this and the Senate voted 96-0 for the relief package!

[**Tell Lois Frankel to
GO BACK TO WASHINGTON
AND PASS THE EMERGENCY RELIEF BILL!**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-369538-867701-4927880-1dd51ef89d-2f4279fe31)
[**After you do, please support my campaign.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-369538-867701-4927880-1dd51ef89d-2f4279fe31) The election will still be held in November and the response of the Democrats has made it clear: **WE MUST REMOVE THE DEMOCRATS FROM THE HOUSE.**

WHEN we get through this pandemic . . . and we will . . . **America will face the largest economic rebuilding since the Great Depression**.

Do you think Democrats will be up to the task? I don't! [Help me defeat Lois Frankel and pave the way for other Republicans to beat Democrat incumbents around the nation](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-369538-867701-4927880-1dd51ef89d-2f4279fe31).

Thanks so much for all that you do, and please support my campaign while telling Lois Frankel to "Get back to Washington!"

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. While Lois Frankel is leisurely staying at home to "slow the spread", my campaign has been organizing blood drives and making CDC-compliant masks for healthcare workers. [**Tell her to DO HER JOB and get back to Washington!**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-369538-867701-4927880-1dd51ef89d-2f4279fe31)

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: I never imagined sending an email like this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Hello -- I never imagined sending an email like this, but our country is facing an unprecedented public health emergency. Our schools, our places of worship, and many businesses are closed as we do our civic duty to slow the outbreak of the coronavirus. So, I need to be honest with you: just as this pandemic has surely impacted you and your family, it has impacted our campaign, too. We've canceled our in-person fundraisers. Our average online contribution has unsurprisingly dropped in the last week. And my campaign manager is working overtime to rework our paid media budget, just as Mitch McConnell's super PAC booked millions of dollars in ads to help our opponent. This crisis will require a different kind of campaign to flip Colorado's Senate seat blue -- one that none of us could have imagined just a few short weeks ago. That means messages like this are more important to winning this election than ever before. We can't win this election without a lot of folks who are able stepping up for our team in the coming weeks, which is why I'm personally asking: **Please, can I count on you to donate $10 or more right now? If you can spare it, your contribution before our FEC deadline will ensure my team has the resources they need to respond to the attacks from McConnell 's super PAC:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200326?refcode=em-200326-full&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Anything you can chip in today would make a huge difference, but please only give if you can afford it. I know people are struggling right now -- and it's critical you put your family and your health first.
Thanks for all you do. Stay safe, my friend.
-- John
P.S. We know this is a difficult time, so please take care of yourself and your loved ones and only pitch in if you can afford to do so. Welcome to our new webcast, "Between Two Firs." Tune in on [Facebook](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/DQE/ni0YAA/t.30e/AYFoTmYcRe2V1vaGqsS45A/h1/Nejq3qQQ6Jn1R8HM5bnp8JRftxYcICZzCv675pJG8coguqLhL1gt95mWnTryUESZNO17ji9Dq-2BF2l9tIsBJ3d1SYcTs5CPA9E1fMNCLk4heQMJAkDCasjWLyX-2FizJuu16KNFgYFjSLVR6Vh2aOstXOeslvdhtw3eWfAwUbb3GMKBYHuuivNHWB7O5DKBhzuE2rUj8eAFncF7YNJTEWYsEgHU-2B4ZU7Gwxhf9JomdKztw00gerT6i4uWL8uOeFaSSqFzTpFPsv1W65UMJsitlvnYeGrmA5w-2BrkXHL-2BWTVsLJatiSXMVaVcy2fCzwm1AeochbTdOrSYMSwgjMwpGDxoDoocyiphb20aiFJIHa6ItKIwa2Q2SUPW8lpc7hnbYW7J/YSVZ) as Doyle discusses the massive relief package currently in Congress, the Jordan Cove pipeline fight, Medicare for All, and how her family is coping with the quarantine.
---
|
---
Dear supporters, The biggest news today is obviously the 2.1 Trillion dollar aid package coming from Congress, the biggest stimulus bill ever. It has been a feeding frenzy for corporate lobbyists and will have a lasting impact on wealth and poverty for our country for a generation. I discuss the bailout, and the most concerning provision of a 500 Billion dollar slush fund for Trump and his cronies, on our first episode of Between Two Firs, our new [Facebook Live](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/DQE/ni0YAA/t.30e/AYFoTmYcRe2V1vaGqsS45A/h2/Nejq3qQQ6Jn1R8HM5bnp8JRftxYcICZzCv675pJG8coguqLhL1gt95mWnTryUESZib6Whvs3BV93Zw-2FKTN-2BAb1KTJ-2FByiwV-2BSjVIFpWCOtSA4CI0nZf0RXkUopcqDAijvMnYXdZYB8BcKVBSkkd6xAreqG49ZfXdvZgDYJKyeU9Z3tVDvwfAlO1pvIQh6AWOfMmO0CW2A0if-2B7BBGLVroqADboV19QVLoBIrn9K6UCZXw6115FzqP0z5EOzauMsniTtH7Zdk9S-2Fn-2BkDsWnNllrHV2k3t88HOrZpa2x-2FQRGb-2Bvemak56OFJI1Ys5xp0tTDDWdx0c-2Fo3QATWGUXX4t41eFdrJ5dQP6kPW1UVqRWQiBGOSBshsPt1SuuF7KuDhW/yibR) program - find it on our feed, and let us know what you think! The coronavirus crisis has touched each of us, and I am working hard to keep on adapting, while staying focused on what's most important: keeping our community healthy and strong. I am seeking out the ways our community is looking out for each other: In Roseburg, the school district is delivering breakfast and lunch to kids, no questions asked, delivered by school bus drivers. In Eugene, the White Bird Clinic has secured the Lane County Fairgrounds as a shelter for the unhoused. In Corvallis, a collective of young people is building hand washing stations for the unhoused, and delivering supplies like thermometers and food items to vulnerable families. Our first training for our Neighbor Connect outreach program was full, with a big team of volunteers ready to hit the phones and deliver the latest public health information to residents across the district. This is who we are - resilient, connected, and committed to fight for those that we don't know as hard as we fight for ourselves. Follow our Facebook Page for nightly "Corona Daily" roundups of news, resources, and inspiration you can use, and use social media to spread the word to homebound friends about our campaign! Onward, Doyle

As a veteran, I appreciate that she also recognizes that service members who've waged this fruitless "war on terror" are among its victims, prioritizing full funding and expansion of VA services among her plans to deal with the causes and effects of our militaristic foreign policy... Canning understands that the military's chief mission has become controlling access to fossil fuels. Spending hundreds of billions in taxpayer subsidies to fossil fuel industries and about the same on the military isn't "defense" but an expensive perpetuation of our dependence. Divesting from war and investing in alternative energy is the path to real national security." - Rick Staggenborg, Albany

NEIGHBOR-CONNECT COVID Response Are you at home, wondering how you can help? We hosted our first training on Tuesday to a packed audience on Zoom to activate our network to respond. In this training, you'll learn:
* How to talk to your neighbors about the COVID 19 Crisis.
* How to use our power dialer, from home, to call 50 neighbors or more in one hour.
* How to use our text messaging platform to send 100 text messages+ an hour.
* The key public health information we will be blasting through these networks.
* What grassroots groups and service agencies in our area are offering resources, and how to connect neighbors in need with those services.
* How you can help our community be resilient and connected in the face of this unprecedented crisis.

As a veteran, I appreciate that she also recognizes that service members who've waged this fruitless "war on terror" are among its victims, prioritizing full funding and expansion of VA services among her plans to deal with the causes and effects of our militaristic foreign policy... Canning understands that the military's chief mission has become controlling access to fossil fuels. Spending hundreds of billions in taxpayer subsidies to fossil fuel industries and about the same on the military isn't "defense" but an expensive perpetuation of our dependence. Divesting from war and investing in alternative energy is the path to real national security." - Rick Staggenborg, Albany | ANNOUNCEMENTS | NEIGHBOR-CONNECT COVID Response Are you at home, wondering how you can help? We hosted our first training on Tuesday to a packed audience on Zoom to activate our network to respond. In this training, you'll learn: How to talk to your neighbors about the COVID 19 Crisis. How to use our power dialer, from home, to call 50 neighbors or more in one hour. How to use our text messaging platform to send 100 text messages+ an hour. The key public health information we will be blasting through these networks. What grassroots groups and service agencies in our area are offering resources, and how to connect neighbors in need with those services. How you can help our community be resilient and connected in the face of this unprecedented crisis. | | MARCH 31 FUNDRAISING DEADLINE With everything happening, our finance team is staying focused on our goal: finishing the quarter strong. This is our last reporting deadline before the election, and we have to send a message that we're not backing down. | "Between Two Firs" Livestreams In this uncertain time when most of the news seems to be scary headlines and statistics, the Canning campaign is starting a series that is a little more light-hearted. Join us for our livestreams with Doyle discussing | UPCOMING EVENTS BETWEEN TWO FIRS: LIVESTREAM As we adjust to the current COVID-19 outbreak, we will be moving all events online. But, don't let that be a reason for your questions to go unanswered! Join us tonight when Doyle goes live 'between two firs' to answer voter questions in real-time. VIRTUAL PHONE BANKING! As we adjust to the current COVID-19 outbreak, we will be moving our canvassing operations online! Join us every Thursday for our digital call-from-home phone bank event! DM @student4canning on Twitter for the link to the event! VIRTUAL PHONE BANKING! As we adjust to the current COVID-19 outbreak, we will be moving our canvassing operations online! Join us every Saturday for our digital call-from-home phone bank event, DM @student4canning on Twitter for the link to the event! | YES WE CAN... | WE'RE ALL IN THIS TOGETHER These are unprecedented times, and we are in this together. Doyle is sharing daily Facebook posts to educate about key news of the day, resources, volunteer needs, and calls to action for SW Oregon. She is curating content to inform, activate, connect and inspire you. You'll want to follow the "Corona Daily" | ONLINE ORGANIZING IS GOING WELL! Team Canning is working hard virtually to ensure this campaign keeps on going. The most important thing you can do for the campaign right now is volunteer from home. We have lots of ways to get involved. Just reply to this message! | Doyle Canning is running for Congress in Oregon's 4th Congressional District. Doyle is rejecting all corporate PAC money in this campaign. She relies on grassroots supporters like you! "Donate to Doyle Canning" | | | Sent Via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Canning For Congress 2020, please .

We want to give you a sense of what this revamped campaign looks like:
* Expanding our email program
* Airing TV ads

* Launching digital ads
* Holding online townhalls and fireside chats

We believe that we can be as effective -- if not more so -- than a traditional campaign. This might even allow us to get the upper hand on Steve Chabot.
[**But for any of this to happen, we need you to pitch in and join us in this fight.**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_eoq1?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_200326_EOQ1_U2_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=9+-+But+for+any+of+this+to+happen+we+need+yo&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200326_EOQ1_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200326_EOQ1_U2_X1")

Team Nikki

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: America marshals all its resources to fight the Coronavirus
body:
Last night, the Senate unanimously passed a $2.2 trillion emergency deal—the largest economic relief package in our nation’s history. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8d1bcf2c82&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • March 26, 2020
---
| | |
# America marshals all its resources to fight the Coronavirus

**Last night,** the Senate unanimously passed a $2.2 trillion emergency deal—the largest economic relief package in our nation’s history. “96-0 in the United States Senate. Congratulations AMERICA!” President Trump [wrote on Twitter](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6fc957a86b&e=3ee4985eea).

**The American** **people** have heroically joined forces and stepped up to help defeat the Coronavirus. But this outbreak has left American workers and small business owners in immediate need of financial relief.

**The CARES Act,** as it’s called, will provide just that:
* $1,200 direct payments to middle-class Americans, plus $500 for each child—a total of $3,400 for a family of four

* $100 billion in direct support to our hospital systems, first responders, and health care workers

* $370+ billion to small business owners to keep employees on the payroll

* Delays federal student loan payments for the next 6 months

**“As we fight** **to protect** American lives, we’re also protecting American livelihoods,” the President said during yesterday’s White House Coronavirus Task Force briefing. “I encourage the House to pass this vital legislation and send the bill to my desk for signature. Without delay, I will sign it immediately.”

**🎬****VP Pence:**[American companies are stepping up to supply medical equipment!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ae8a02b510&e=3ee4985eea)

**The Coronavirus** has put both America and the entire world through an unprecedented medical crisis. But from the beginning of the outbreak, President Trump took clear and decisive action, immediately putting life-saving travel restrictions in place and forging a partnership between the Federal government and private sector to take on this challenge together.

**Today, those efforts continued** as the President participated in a video teleconference with fellow G20 leaders to address global needs. Later, he and Vice President Mike Pence held another teleconference with our nation’s Governors to continue supporting local response efforts.

**🎬****President Trump:** [The more aggressively we commit to social distancing, the sooner we can return to normal.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ee30f00106&e=3ee4985eea)

**Dr. Birx:** [“When you are protecting yourself, you are protecting others.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bb9b0e1b8a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump ****and Vice President Pence participate**** in a video teleconference with Governors on COVID-19** | March 26, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=55ab613463&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f463e69e2d&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=98a1db5923)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Live Kennedy Broadcast Tonight at 8 p.m.: Join Joe and Peter Reynolds for a reading of Rose's Garden [Young families encouraged to join!]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390090/55b66746/23e00303/80e1a4d/2378744937/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | As Massachusetts and many states across the country are issuing stay at home advisories, we are working hard to bring you critical information, useful resources, and other content to help you navigate this difficult time. So, every Monday and Thursday we will be premiering live "Kennedy Evening Broadcasts," where Joe will be joined by a special guest to provide information, entertainment, or some great tips for how to spend time at home. Tonight Joe will be joined by author Peter Reynolds for a reading of Rose's Garden tonight at 8 p.m. This broadcast will be streamed live across [**Facebook**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390090/55b66746/23e00303/80e1a48/2378744937/VEsE/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.facebook.com/JoeKennedyIII"), [**Twitter**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390090/55b66746/23e00303/80e1a4a/2378744937/VEsF/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://twitter.com/joekennedy"), and [**YouTube**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390090/55b66746/23e00303/80e1a56/2378744937/VEsC/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC7oDDRXYM0zoDQO7HAxvlBg"). **Follow our pages:** [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390090/55b66746/23e00303/80e1a48/2378744937/VEsD/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.facebook.com/JoeKennedyIII")[](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390090/55b66746/23e00303/80e1a4a/2378744937/VEsA/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://twitter.com/joekennedy")[](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390090/55b66746/23e00303/80e1a56/2378744937/VEsB/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC7oDDRXYM0zoDQO7HAxvlBg") Peter Reynolds is an author and illustrator living in Dedham, Massachusetts. Rose's Garden is a children's book dedicated to Joe's great grandmother Rose Fitzgerald Kennedy. At the core of this book's message is patience, creativity, and working together - something we can all use at this moment. Young families are encouraged to tune in for tips on how to maintain positivity at home during this time -- and to enjoy the reading together! See you live at 8 p.m. \- Team Kennedy |

Follow our pages: "" "" "" Peter Reynolds is an author and illustrator living in Dedham, Massachusetts. Rose's Garden is a children's book dedicated to Joe's great grandmother Rose Fitzgerald Kennedy. At the core of this book's message is patience, creativity, and working together - something we can all use at this moment. Young families are encouraged to tune in for tips on how to maintain positivity at home during this time -- and to enjoy the reading together! See you live at 8 p.m. \- Team Kennedy | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts. ---|--- | This email was sent by "". PO Box 15, Boston, MA 02137. "" "" "" Email is an important way for Joe Kennedy to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? "". This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com; "". If you no longer want to hear from Joe Kennedy, "" Questions or concerns? "". |

name: MJ Hegar Survey Team
subject: What matters most to you? [SURVEY]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Take our survey to let MJ know which ones matter most to you.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903f8/7f51f7bc/4ccd12d1/4ef1d754/3452643995/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | Survey for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Status: Incomplete **[**BEGIN SURVEY**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903f8/7f51f7bc/4ccd12d1/4ef1d74b/3452643995/VEsE/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-gensurvey")**
---
Peter,

There's been a lot on everyone's mind right now, but even as we all work together to stop the spread of COVID-19, we can't let progress on the other issues this campaign was built on fall to the wayside. The pandemic has revealed how urgently we need to fix our health care system -- but climate change and gun violence are still threatening our communities, too.

**[Will you take MJ's Priorities Survey to let her know what issues are most important to you?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903f8/7f51f7bc/4ccd12d1/4ef1d74b/3452643995/VEsF/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-gensurvey")**

Sen. John Cornyn has neglected Texans by refusing to do what's needed to improve our health care system -- even fighting to repeal the Affordable Care Act. He has questioned the existence of climate change and downplayed its threat, explaining the hottest month ever on record as "it's summer." He has fought against common-sense gun reforms, including universal background checks on all gun sales, which Texans overwhelmingly support.

**[It's clear that Texans still care about these issues -- take our survey to let MJ know which ones matter most to you.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903f8/7f51f7bc/4ccd12d1/4ef1d74b/3452643995/VEsC/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-gensurvey")**

\-- Team MJ

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903f8/7f51f7bc/4ccd12d1/4ef1d74a/3452643995/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMjIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200327.3__1122__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903f8/7f51f7bc/4ccd12d1/4ef1d749/3452643995/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExMjIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1122&amount=10&recurring=true")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648903f8/7f51f7bc/4ccd12d1/4ef1d748/3452643995/VEsB/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

name: Stars and Stripes Forever PAC
subject: 👊 We Must Fight Back 👊
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stars & Stripes Forever PAC
body:
Peter, we can just let them get away with this... * | | |
A message from...
---
John Philip Sousa IV
National Chairman of Stars and Stripes Forever PAC
Formerly the 2016 Committee and National Draft Ben Carson for President Committee
Dear Peter, Last month I shared with you that even though he dropped out of the presidential race... [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SSmoG9&mc=9t&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=N&z=EzcgMpH&) ..."Mini Mike" Bloomberg is still committed to spending $2 BILLION to defeat President Trump this Election! **And he just kicked off that promise by dumping**$18,000,000** into the Democratic National Committee's coffers for the express purpose of **DESTROYING** President Trump.** As I told you, the Democrats and Bloomberg are targeting key swing states where just a few percentage points in the wrong direction will spell President Trump's -- _and other good Conservatives'_ \-- defeat. But little do they know that we've been airing our highly-effective, issues-based radio ads directly to Black and Minority voters in those same battleground states _since August_. **But in order to keep our hard-hitting radio ads ON THE AIR in minority neighborhoods throughout these CRITICAL battleground states,_we MUST raise $16,280 each month_!** That's the price to keep these ads up-and-running for one entire month in Alabama, California, Iowa, Maine, Michigan, Minnesota and New Mexico --- _all carefully selected for high percentage of minority voters, a battleground state, and/or to defeat a radical socialist who hates America_! Peter, if we're going to win in November... WE MUST STAY ON THE AIR AND EXPAND INTO OTHER BATTLEGROUND STATES IMMEDIATELY! Yes, we can STOP Bloomberg and re-elect President Trump, but we need your IMMEDIATE help to keep our ads on the air and reach even more minority voters. **The payment for April is DUE NOW...** [Please respond today with your most generous contribution.](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SSmoG9&mc=9t&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=N&z=EQtuFC0&) Make no mistake about it, the 2020 election is going to come down to the wire. And we need your help to FIGHT BACK against Bloomberg and the Democrats --- and give President Trump four more years to Make America Great Again. [Please do what you can!](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SSmoG9&mc=9t&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=N&z=EG6rB0O&) | | _Urgently,_

John Philip Sousa IV
_National Chairman, Stars & Stripes Forever PAC_
---|---

Stars & Stripes Forever PAC (C) 2020\. All rights reserved.

National Headquarters | P.O. Box 1351 | Merrifield, VA 22116-1351

---

You're receiving this email because you are committed to protecting America from rabid liberals hell-bent on destroying conservative values.
If you are giving up on this critical fight, please UNSUBSCRIBE below.

name: Claudia Tenney
subject: re: still marching on
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |

In times like this, we have to be sure to stick together. _Peter - We know that the coronavirus outbreak has put many American families in an unexpected financial situation.
